protocol.name: discover-inputs
protocol.objective: Load input files using the strategy declared in workflow.yaml

strategies.strategy: Read all files matching the glob pattern. Use when the entire document is needed (e.g., single PRD file).
Read only the file matching a specific template variable. Use when a single shard is needed (e.g., one epic by number).
Read index.md first, identify relevant sections, load only those shards. Use when the document is sharded and only some sections are relevant.

flow.step: For each declared pattern, determine load_strategy

Execute the corresponding strategy: - FULL_LOAD: Read the file at the resolved path using Read tool - SELECTIVE_LOAD: Resolve the template variable (e.g., {{story_key}}), then read the matching file - INDEX_GUIDED: Read index.md in the target directory, identify relevant sections, load only those files
Store loaded content in context variables for downstream step use
If any declared input file is missing and not marked optional: invoke error-recovery handler for missing_file
